---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new component or an improvement for @kahitsan/ksui.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

Thanks for the idea. We like hearing how people want to use ksui.

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
Tell us what you are stuck on or what is hard right now. Focus on the problem, not the solution yet.

**What is your idea?**
Describe the component or change you have in mind. A rough sketch or example is fine.

**Did you think about other options?**
If you looked at other ways to solve this, tell us what they were and why they did not fit.

**Would you be willing to help build it?**
No pressure at all, but it helps us plan.
- (yes / maybe / no)
